entity.label: Iddo
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Lovely. The son of Zechariah (1 Chr. 27:21), the ruler of Manasseh in David’s time.

verses.text: Of the half tribe of Manasseh in Gilead, Iddo the son of Zechariah: of Benjamin, Jaasiel the son of Abner:
